title: SpiffyHUD x Gnetum
description: Makes SpiffyHUD use Forge API for rendering its elements instead of relying on mixins, allowing it to work with Gnetum
body:
It is what it says.

[SpiffyHUD](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spiffyhud) has an [issue](https://github.com/decce6/Gnetum/issues/29) with [Gnetum](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gnetum) mod due to the way it handles rendering its HUD elements (TL;DR, it handles it through a mixin meaning it's blah blah blah). [Gnetum](https://github.com/Keksuccino/SpiffyHUD/pull/42)'s author actually made a fix for this, but Spiffy's author denied merging it. I decided to implement it in this addon.

It disables the mixin implementation of the renderer and replaces it with one that relies on appropriate Forge events.

If you don't plan on using Gnetum (or any similar mod) alongside SpiffyHUD, this addon will do nothing.
